resources.string: Access SMB, FTP, and WebDAV drives
Use pure black background for dark themes
Only available on Android 12 and above
Show full folder and video names without truncation
Seekbar and volume/brightness sliders animate with a bounce effect
Hide the background of all player control buttons
Color player buttons using the current theme colors
Keep player controls in dark theme regardless of app theme
Use your device\'s default font instead of the app font
Show hidden folders starting with a dot (.) including android, data, system folders and .nomedia files
Show label for new unplayed videos
Display a \"New\" label on videos added within specified days that have never been played
Days threshold for new video label
Videos added within the last %d days without playback history will be marked as new
Generate thumbnails for network streams (May increase data usage on mobile networks)
Choose how thumbnails are extracted from videos
Quickest extraction. Uses the 10-second mark of the video.
Requires more processing. Extracts a frame from further into the video to avoid blank title cards.
Extract thumbnail at %d%% of the video duration
Automatically scroll to the last played video when opening video lists
Mark video as watched when playback reaches %d%%
Show next/previous buttons for all videos in folder
Automatically play next video when current ends
Automatically enter PIP mode when pressing home or back
Resume video automatically after unlocking if it was playing before the screen locked
Keep video paused after the screen is unlocked
Show advance overlay for speed control during long press and swipe
Export settings to an XML file
Import settings from an XML file
Load Lua scripts from configuration directory
Delete all cached video thumbnails (will regenerate as you browse folders)
All customized player control layouts will be reset to default positions
Follow video orientation unless manually changed
Duration to skip forward on custom skip button
Close after the end of playback
Swipe left or right on screen to seek forward or backward
Swipe left or right on the top or bottom of the screen to seek subtitles
Touch the subtitle and drag up or down to move it. Brightness and volume swipes still work elsewhere
Adjust how much distance is covered per swipe
Ignore playback commands from headset and Bluetooth devices, etc
Show system status bar with controls
Swap the left and right double/single tap gestures
Use single tap for center gesture
Use a single tap in the center for gestures (like play/pause) instead of a double tap.
Use single tap for left/right gesture
Use a single tap in the left and right areas for gestures instead of a double tap.
Video will only seek by dragging the seekbar, not by tapping it.
Seek relative to drag start position instead of absolute finger position.

You can bind custom actions to these gestures in input.conf using the following key codes:

Left: MBTN_LEFT_DBL
Center: MBTN_MID_DBL
Right: MBTN_RIGHT_DBL

You can bind custom actions to media controls in input.conf using the following key codes:

Previous: PREV
Play/Pause: PLAYPAUSE
Next: NEXT
When enabled, tapping on thumbnails enters selection mode. When disabled, tapping thumbnails plays the video. Has no effect in grid mode.
Enabling gpu-next may cause purple screen issues during playback on some devices.
If you experience purple screens, try to disable opengl-pbo in Advanced settings (mpv.conf):
May fix black screens on some video codecs, can also improve performance at the cost of quality
Enable Vulkan rendering on supported devices (may improve performance)
Search and download subtitles from Online sources
Manage custom player buttons with Lua code
Subtitles will not appear unless you manually enable them during playback.
Automatically load external subtitles with the same name.
Open file picker in the same folder as the current video
Chosen folder to open when manually adding subtitles
Delete all files in the current save location
Are you sure you want to delete all downloaded subtitles? This action cannot be undone.
Required for subtitle searches. Get yours at sub.wyzie.io/redeem
Preferred languages, audio channels, pitch correction
Prevents the audio from becoming high-pitched at faster speeds and low-pitched at slower speeds
Automatically adjust audio volume to maintain consistent loudness levels
Audio language(s) to be selected by default on a video with multiple audio streams, Two- or three-letter languages codes work. Multiple values can be delimited by comma.
Dumps and copies the logs to be shared with the developers
Helps in debugging but may hinder performance
Are you sure you want to clear your playback history?
This will clear all your previous media\'s playback positions, selected subtitles and audio tracks along with their delays and speeds
Track and display recently played videos and playlists
Enable experimental or advanced features such as stats page and Anime4K upscaling
gpu-next is incompatible with Anime4K shaders. When Anime4K is enabled, the app will automatically use the legacy \'gpu\' backend for shader compatibility.
Cannot use Anime4K when gpu-next is enabled
Join our channel for updates and news
Discuss and chat with the community
Show community links shortcut in the home header
Scale subtitles by window size and use video margins
Some filters may not work on your current video driver
Overview. CPU/GPU usage, A/V sync, dropped frames, clock speed.
Frame timing. Decode/render times, scaler info.
Cache status. Buffer health, demuxer cache, seekable ranges.
Current keybindings. List of mapped keyboard shortcuts.
Track list. Details of video, audio and subtitle tracks.
Looks like %s experienced an unexpected error. Consider sharing the crash logs in a GitHub issue.
Database deleted successfully. Please restart the app.
This crash appears to be database-related. Try deleting the database to fix it.
Show ripple when double tap seeking
Enter language codes separated by commas (e.g., eng,jpn,spa)
Display the video progress bar during gesture seeking
Tap the button below to add folders you want to hide from the folder list
This will remove all folders from the blacklist. You can add them back later.
Enter the URL of an M3U playlist file
Failed to load audio file: Invalid URI
No files or folders match your search query
Type to search files and folders
Play recently played or first video
Add videos to your device to see folders here
Your recently played videos and playlists will appear here
Create a playlist to see it listed here
Add videos from the browser to build your playlist
This folder contains no videos or subfolders
Show and index audio files in the browser and playlists
Show the folder path breadcrumbs at the top of Tree View

plurals.name: delete_confirm_message
plurals.item: This action cannot be undone. The selected item will be permanently deleted.
This action cannot be undone. The selected items will be permanently deleted.

resources.string: Connect with us on social media

Successfully imported: %1$d
Failed: %2$d
Version: %3$s

Please restart the app for all changes to take effect.
Set storage location and enable Lua scripts first
This will delete all cached thumbnails (local and network) from storage and memory.
Show \'Media Info\' as an option in system-wide \'Open with\' menus
Show the Shorts tab in the bottom navigation bar
Automatically swipe to the next short when current one ends
Show horizontal videos in the feed if they are short
Manage enable/disable, shuffle, and blocked content
Enter custom hide time in milliseconds
Are you sure you want to reset this region to defaults?
Save the script first before sharing
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Drag to reorder • Tap any slot to expand & edit
Backup or share all your custom buttons with their Lua code as an XML file
Button is active in the player
Generating thumbnails for network streams (M3U/HTTP) may significantly increase background data usage and loading times. Proceed?
Changing this will clear your currently saved thumbnail cache. New thumbnails will be generated automatically as you browse.
Reset thumbnail at %1$d%% of the video duration.
Only show subtitles optimized for hearing impaired
Check for new versions on startup
Manually check for new versions on GitHub
Create a playlist or add one from an m3u URL
Import a playlist from a web URL

plurals.name: remove_from_playlist_message
plurals.item: The selected video will be removed from this playlist. The original file will not be deleted.
The selected videos will be removed from this playlist. The original files will not be deleted.

resources.string: Move to top of Recently Played
Remove all marks and watch history
Add SMB, FTP, or WebDAV connections to browse network files
This folder contains no files or directories
Enable it in Advanced Settings to track your playback history
Videos you play will appear here
You\'ve seen all vertical videos for now.
mpvEx requires \"Photos and videos\" permission to access and play your video files stored on your device.
mpvEx requires \"Storage\" permission to access and play your media files stored on your device.
mpvEx requires \"All file access\" permission to discover media and subtitles on your device due to a change in security policy in Android 11 and later versions.
mpvEx needs access to your video files to provide its core functionality as a media player.
On Android 13 and above, this permission allows the app to read video files from your device\'s storage, including Downloads, Movies, and DCIM folders.
This permission allows the app to read media files from your device\'s storage to play videos and audio.
The permission is used exclusively for:
• Discovering and displaying your video files\n• Playing media content\n• Loading subtitle files
mpvEx has always required storage access permission as it\'s essential for the app to find all media and subtitle files on your device, including the ones that are not supported by the system.
However, due to a change in security policy, apps built for Android 11 and above now require additional permission to continue accessing the same.
Please know that this permission is only used for the auto-discovery of media/subtitle files on your device and will not allow us to access the private data files stored by other apps in any way.
mpvEx is an open source project. You can review the source code and verify how permissions are used by visiting our GitHub repository at:
Be rest assured, your privacy is our utmost priority, and we neither access your files for other purposes nor transfer or store them to our servers. They remain safe on your device.
Screen stays awake while video is paused
Screen can turn off while video is paused
Control buttons appear below the seekbar
Control buttons appear above the seekbar
Long press to reorder items. Tap the \'-\' icon to remove them.
Tap buttons from the \'Available Palette\' below
All available buttons are in use.
Enter custom seek duration in seconds (1-120)
Soft, muted colors with gentle look
Vintage film look with soft focus
This will permanently delete the original video file(s) from your device storage.\n\nThis action cannot be undone.

plurals.name: recents_remove_confirm_subtitle
plurals.item: This will remove the selected item from your recently played list. The original video file will not be deleted.
This will remove the selected items from your recently played list. The original video files will not be deleted.
